name: Greek Olive Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except olives in the bread machine pan, following the manufacturer's order.
2. Add olives at the raisin/nut signal or 5 to 10 minutes before the last kneading cycle ends.
3. Select the basic/white cycle.
4. Use medium or light crust color setting.
5. Do not use delay cycles.
6. Remove baked bread from the pan and cool on a wire rack.
